mapper.select: SELECT * FROM question ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question (title, content, type, score, difficulty, subject, tags, judge_answer, option_a, option_b, option_c, option_d, correct_option, input_desc, output_desc, sample_input, sample_output, standard_code) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{score}, #{difficulty}, #{subject}, #{tags}, #{judgeAnswer}, #{optionA}, #{optionB}, #{optionC}, #{optionD}, #{correctOption}, #{inputDesc}, #{outputDesc}, #{sampleInput}, #{sampleOutput}, #{standardCode})
mapper.update: UPDATE question SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, type = #{type}, score = #{score}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, subject = #{subject}, tags = #{tags}, judge_answer = #{judgeAnswer}, option_a = #{optionA}, option_b = #{optionB}, option_c = #{optionC}, option_d = #{optionD}, correct_option = #{correctOption}, input_desc = #{inputDesc}, output_desc = #{outputDesc}, sample_input = #{sampleInput}, sample_output = #{sampleOutput}, standard_code = #{standardCode} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM question WHERE type = #{type} ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT #{count}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM question WHERE type = #{type}
